title: coupon — helper functions
description: Ergonomic helpers for resolving coupons by code, computing hypothetical discounts, generating unique codes, and reading redemption counts. All helpers are thin wrappers around bound services — never business logic.

helpers.purpose: Cache-aware lookup for a coupon within a tenant. Returns the Coupon model or null when the code is unknown / soft-deleted. Does NOT check the active window — callers may want to surface COUPON_EXPIRED with details on an inactive coupon.

helpers.signature: coupon_is_redeemable(Coupon $coupon, string $customerType, string $customerId, string $appliedToType, string $appliedToId, int $sourceAmountCents, string $sourceCurrency): array{is_redeemable: bool, refusal_reason: ?string}
helpers.purpose: Pure read of every redemption gate for a proposed (coupon, customer, target, amount) tuple. Does NOT touch the DB counter. Returns the first refusal_reason that trips, or is_redeemable=true. Used by preview + validate endpoints.

helpers.signature: compute_coupon_discount(Coupon $coupon, int $sourceAmountCents, string $sourceCurrency): array{discount_amount_cents: int, final_amount_cents: int, discount_snapshot: array}
helpers.purpose: Given a coupon + source amount, computes the resulting discount + final amount + frozen snapshot. Read-only. Called by preview endpoint + by CouponRedeemer inside the redemption transaction.
Count of non-reversed redemptions for a specific (coupon, customer) pair. Used to enforce per_customer_limit. Cached via cpn:redemption-count:{coupon_id}:{customer_type}:{customer_id} (60s TTL).
Returns true when coupon.usage_cap IS NULL OR coupon.usage_count < coupon.usage_cap. Consulted before every redemption to short-circuit refusal path.

Generate a code from a template respecting the collision-retry loop. Templates: {RAND8} / {RAND4} / {SEQ} / {CAMPAIGN} / literal. Returns the generated code (guaranteed unique against active codes in the tenant). Throws when collision retries exhausted (rare — > 40-bit entropy on per-tenant scope).

Returns true when the discount type requires the `coupon_advanced_discount_types` entitlement. Types: free_period, first_month_free, bogo. Small tier types (percent, fixed_amount, free_shipping) return false.
Returns the current discount_snapshot schema version — bumped when the frozen snapshot shape changes. Downstream marketing + finance consumers branch on this.

notes: Helpers deliberately delegate — testing swaps the bound service to a stub, and every helper follows.
No helper directly touches the DB — everything routes through repositories or services.

coupon_is_redeemable() is intentionally a `read` — the atomic write path is CouponRedeemer::redeem() which acquires the row lock. Preview + validate call the helper; only the invoice/membership creation transaction calls redeem().
